see_evidence: Auditability: append-only log with each entry hashed to prior — any alteration invalidates chain
Execution-level accountability: tamper-resistant timestamped ledger of every action
Observability turns Responsible AI into an engineering control loop — enforcement not aspiration
checks_implemented: RP-PRE-1 (T1): artifact in current queue — block if not
RP-PRE-2 (T1): SHA known/verified — block if unknown
RP-PRE-3 (T2): SEE pre-loaded if required — flag if missing
RP-PRE-4 (T1): no open IC trigger from prior artifact — block until resolved
RP-POST-1 (T1): receipt exists with required fields — block export if missing
RP-POST-2 (T1): output SHAs declared in receipt — block if missing
RP-POST-3 (T2): IC condition triggered post-processing — flag for interrupt checker
RP-POST-4 (T2): new success pattern emerged — flag for logging and sidecar

validation_tests.test: T2 SHA unknown — RP-PRE-2 T1 block
T3 open IC trigger — RP-PRE-4 T1 block
T4 SEE missing — RP-PRE-3 T2 flag (not block)
T5 hash chain verification — 16 entries, VALID
T6 log summary — pass/block/flag counts correct

new_capabilities: CAPABILITY: 8 governance checks run before and after every artifact — execution-time enforcement, not just preflight
CAPABILITY: Hash-chained RUNTIME_PULSE_LOG_v1.jsonl — tamper-evident, any alteration invalidates the chain
CAPABILITY: T1 checks block before mutations; T2 checks flag without stopping — tiered response
CAPABILITY: RP-PRE-4 enforces interrupt checker integration — open IC triggers block next artifact start
CAPABILITY: CLI subcommands: run-pre, run-post, verify, summary, query — all backed by hash chain
CAPABILITY: Log query with artifact_id/stage_id/decision filters — retrospective governance analysis
chatgpt_deployment: Run pre-pulse: python runtime_pulse_logger_v1.py run-pre --artifact-id X --stage-name Y --stage-id Z
Run post-pulse: python runtime_pulse_logger_v1.py run-post --artifact-id X --stage-name Y --stage-id Z --receipt-path /path/to/receipt.json
Exit 0 = pass/flag only; exit 1 = T1 block occurred
